name: AWS DynamoDB
description: This app supports CRUD operations in a AWS DynamoDB database

actions.name: Describe Global Table
actions.description: Fetch metadata of a global table

parameters.name: global_table_name
parameters.description: Name of Global Table to describe

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

parameters.name: backup_arn
parameters.description: Backup ARN of backup to describe

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Name of the table to describe

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Create Global Table
actions.description: Create a global table from an existing table in the specified regions

parameters.name: global_table_name
parameters.description: Name of table to make global

parameters.name: replication_group
parameters.description: Name of region to create global table (accepts comma separated regions)

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: List Global Tables
actions.description: List the global tables of a specific region

parameters.name: exclusive_start_global_table_name
parameters.description: List global tables after specific given global table name

parameters.name: region_name
parameters.description: List the global tables of a given region

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.description: Maximum number of tables to fetch

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: List Backups
actions.description: List all the backups present in the database

parameters.name: backup_type
parameters.description: Type of backup to list

parameters.name: exclusive_start_backup_arn
parameters.description: List backups after specific given backup arn

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.description: Maximum number of backups to fetch

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: List backups of specific table

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: List backups created after provided date.(Valid date format allowed: YYYY/MM/DD)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: List backups created before provided data.(Valid date format allowed: YYYY/MM/DD)

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

parameters.name: backup_arn
parameters.description: ARN associated with the backup to delete

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Create Backup
actions.description: Create a backup of an existing table

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Name of the table to backup

parameters.name: backup_name
parameters.description: Name of the backup

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Restore Backup Table
actions.description: Create a new table from an existing backup

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Name of the table to restore

parameters.name: backup_arn
parameters.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) associated with the backup

parameters.name: billing_mode_override
parameters.description: Billing mode of the restored table

parameters.name: read_capacity_override
parameters.description: Read capacity override (for PROVISIONED billing mode)

parameters.name: write_capacity_override
parameters.description: Write capacity override (for PROVISIONED billing mode)

parameters.name: restore_secondary_indexes
parameters.description: Restore secondary indexes
parameters.default: Restore the table without secondary indexes

parameters.name: sse_enable_override
parameters.description: Server-side encryption(SSE) setting

parameters.name: kms_master_key_id
parameters.description: Key to use for the AWS KMS encryption (Used when SSE is enabled)
contains: aws dynamodb kms master key id

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: List Tables
actions.description: List all the tables present in the database

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.description: Maximum number of tables to fetch

parameters.name: exclusive_start_table_name
parameters.description: List table after specific given table name

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Delete Table
actions.description: Delete a table from the database

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Name of table to delete

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Create Table
actions.description: Create a table in the database

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Name of table to be created

parameters.name: billing_mode
parameters.description: Billing mode to be used for table

parameters.name: partition_key_name
parameters.description: Name of partition key of table

parameters.name: partition_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_name
parameters.description: Name of sort key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of sort key of table

parameters.name: read_capacity_units
parameters.description: Read capacity units for provisioned mode

parameters.name: write_capacity_units
parameters.description: Write capacity units for provisioned mode

parameters.name: local_secondary_index
parameters.description: JSON input for creating local secondary index

parameters.name: global_secondary_index
parameters.description: JSON input for creating global secondary index

parameters.name: enable_stream
parameters.description: Enable DynamoDB streams for the table

parameters.name: stream_view_type
parameters.description: View type of DynamoDB streams

parameters.name: sse
parameters.description: Settings used to enable server-side encryption

parameters.name: kms_master_key_id
parameters.description: The KMS key that should be used for the KMS encryption
contains: aws dynamodb kms master key id

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: JSON list of tags to add to table

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Delete Item
actions.description: Delete an item from the table

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Table name to delete item from

parameters.name: condition_expression
parameters.description: Condition to be checked before deleting an item

parameters.name: partition_key_name
parameters.description: Name of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_name
parameters.description: Name of sort key of table

parameters.name: partition_key_value
parameters.description: Partition key value of item to delete

parameters.name: sort_key_value
parameters.description: Sort key value of item to delete

parameters.name: partition_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of sort key of table

parameters.name: expression_attribute_names
parameters.description: Attribute names json

parameters.name: expression_attribute_values
parameters.description: Attribute values json

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Put Item
actions.description: Add an item to the table

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Table name to add item in

parameters.name: item_json
parameters.description: JSON of item to be added in the table

parameters.name: condition_expression
parameters.description: Condition to be checked before inserting an item

parameters.name: expression_attribute_names
parameters.description: Attribute names json

parameters.name: expression_attribute_values
parameters.description: Attribute values json

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Update Item
actions.description: Update an item in the table

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Table name to update item in

parameters.name: update_expression
parameters.description: Expression to update the item

parameters.name: partition_key_name
parameters.description: Name of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_name
parameters.description: Name of sort key of table

parameters.name: partition_key_value
parameters.description: Partition key value of item to update

parameters.name: sort_key_value
parameters.description: Sort key value of item to update

parameters.name: partition_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of sort key of table

parameters.name: expression_attribute_names
parameters.description: Attribute names json

parameters.name: expression_attribute_values
parameters.description: Attribute values json

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Get Item
actions.description: Get an item from the table

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Table name to fetch the item from

parameters.name: partition_key_name
parameters.description: Name of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_name
parameters.description: Name of sort key of table

parameters.name: partition_key_value
parameters.description: Partition key value of item to fetch

parameters.name: sort_key_value
parameters.description: Sort key value of item to fetch

parameters.name: partition_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of partition key of table

parameters.name: sort_key_datatype
parameters.description: Datatype of sort key of table

parameters.name: attributes_to_get
parameters.description: To fetch specific attributes from the item(accepts comma seperated attributes)

parameters.name: reserved_keyword_attributes
parameters.description: To fetch attributes from items whose names are same as reserved keywords(accepts comma seperated attributes)

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Name of Table to perform query on

parameters.name: index_name
parameters.description: Name of index to be used for the query

parameters.name: expression_attribute_names
parameters.description: Attribute names json

parameters.name: expression_attribute_values
parameters.description: Attribute values json

parameters.name: key_condition_expression
parameters.description: Expression to apply conditions on partition key and sort key to fetch data accordingly from the table or index

parameters.name: filter_expression
parameters.description: Expression to filter data from table.A FilterExpression does not allow key attributes. You cannot define a filter expression based on a partition key or a sort key

parameters.name: projection_expression
parameters.description: Defines the attributes to be included in the result. If this expression is provided SELECT value is set to SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES. The attributes in the expression must be separated by commas

parameters.name: select
parameters.description: Retrieve all item attributes, specific item attributes, the count of matching items, or in the case of an index, some or all of the attributes projected into the index

parameters.name: return_consumed_capacity
parameters.description: Determines the level of detail about either provisioned or on-demand throughput consumption that is returned in the response

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to process

parameters.name: sort_descending
parameters.description: By default, the sort order for query data is ascending. To reverse the order, set the sort_descending parameter to true

parameters.name: consistent_read
parameters.description: Determines the read consistency model: If set to true, then the operation uses strongly consistent reads; otherwise, the operation uses eventually consistent reads

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials
